title: Agricultural Leaders Ask Farmers to Sign Up and Be Counted in the 2012 Census of Agriculture
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture is preparing to mail the 2012 Census of Agriculture to millions of U.S. farmers and ranchers in late December. The Census of Agriculture is a complete count of U.S. farms and ranches and the people who operate them. Federal and state agricultural leaders are remind...

title: Farmers Are Reminded to Sign Up for the 2012 Census of Agriculture
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture is preparing to mail the 2012 Census of Agriculture to millions of U.S. farmers and ranchers in late December. Producers are reminded not to miss their opportunity to be counted by signing up for the Census before July 1. The Census of Agriculture is a complete cou...
